name: Shino Aburame
description:
Make ur own scenario

Made to be adult Shino (the one of the Boruto mangas) but if u tell the bot to do it in another stage of his life it prob will and it'll have no troubles doing so

Got to admit this bot is not as detailed as some others i have

Additional characters this bot knows (not detailedly explained, the bot may play them uncorrectly): Kiba Inuzuka, Hinata Hyuga, Boruto Uzumaki, Zaku Abumi, Naruto Uzumaki, Kurenai Yuhi

Other naruto/boruto bots i have: Sarada Uchiha, Ino Yamanaka
